parts.label: Front Strut Assembly — MacPherson (Left)
parts.function: Complete MacPherson strut unit for the front left corner, integrating the shock absorber and spring perch into a single structural assembly.

parts.label: Front Strut Assembly — MacPherson (Right)
parts.function: Complete MacPherson strut unit for the front right corner, integrating the shock absorber and spring perch into a single structural assembly.

parts.label: Front Coil Spring (Left)
parts.function: Progressive-rate coil spring mounted on the front left strut to support vehicle weight and control ride height at the front left corner.

parts.label: Front Coil Spring (Right)
parts.function: Progressive-rate coil spring mounted on the front right strut to support vehicle weight and control ride height at the front right corner.

parts.label: Front Shock Absorber (Left)
parts.function: Hydraulic damper within the front left MacPherson strut that controls suspension oscillation and maintains tyre contact with the road surface.

parts.label: Front Shock Absorber (Right)
parts.function: Hydraulic damper within the front right MacPherson strut that controls suspension oscillation and maintains tyre contact with the road surface.

parts.label: Front Lower Control Arm (Left)
parts.function: Aluminium wishbone connecting the front left wheel carrier to the front subframe, controlling lateral and longitudinal wheel movement.

parts.label: Front Lower Control Arm (Right)
parts.function: Aluminium wishbone connecting the front right wheel carrier to the front subframe, controlling lateral and longitudinal wheel movement.

parts.label: Front Anti-Roll Bar (Sway Bar)
parts.function: Torsion bar linking both front suspension corners to resist body roll during cornering and maintain vehicle composure.

parts.label: Front ARB End Link and Bushing (Left)
parts.function: Drop link connecting the front left anti-roll bar to the strut assembly, transmitting torsional load between the bar and the suspension.

parts.label: Front ARB End Link and Bushing (Right)
parts.function: Drop link connecting the front right anti-roll bar to the strut assembly, transmitting torsional load between the bar and the suspension.

parts.label: Front Subframe / Crossmember
parts.function: Aluminium front crossmember bolted to the body that carries the front control arms, anti-roll bar, and steering rack as a complete front axle module.

parts.label: Front Wheel Hub and Bearing (Left)
parts.function: Flanged wheel hub with integrated angular contact bearing at the front left wheel carrier, providing the rotating interface for the wheel and brake rotor.

parts.label: Front Wheel Hub and Bearing (Right)
parts.function: Flanged wheel hub with integrated angular contact bearing at the front right wheel carrier, providing the rotating interface for the wheel and brake rotor.

parts.label: Rear Multi-Link Control Arms — Upper, Lower, Toe, Camber (Left Set)
parts.function: Five-link aluminium control arm set at the rear left corner precisely controlling wheel geometry through bump and rebound travel.

parts.label: Rear Multi-Link Control Arms — Upper, Lower, Toe, Camber (Right Set)
parts.function: Five-link aluminium control arm set at the rear right corner precisely controlling wheel geometry through bump and rebound travel.

parts.label: Rear Coil Spring (Left)
parts.function: Progressive-rate rear left coil spring seated on the lower spring perch supporting vehicle load and determining rear ride height.

parts.label: Rear Coil Spring (Right)
parts.function: Progressive-rate rear right coil spring seated on the lower spring perch supporting vehicle load and determining rear ride height.

parts.label: Rear Shock Absorber (Left)
parts.function: Twin-tube hydraulic rear left damper controlling suspension oscillation and maintaining rear tyre contact patch under all road conditions.

parts.label: Rear Shock Absorber (Right)
parts.function: Twin-tube hydraulic rear right damper controlling suspension oscillation and maintaining rear tyre contact patch under all road conditions.

parts.label: Rear Anti-Roll Bar
parts.function: Rear torsion bar connecting both rear suspension corners via the multi-link subframe to resist body roll and tune handling balance.

parts.label: Rear Subframe / Axle Carrier
parts.function: Aluminium rear axle carrier bolted to the body structure that anchors all five rear links, the anti-roll bar, and the differential.

parts.label: Rear Wheel Hub and Bearing (Left)
parts.function: Rear left wheel carrier-mounted hub with integrated angular contact bearing providing the rotating interface for the rear wheel, brake disc, and drive shaft flange.

parts.label: Rear Wheel Hub and Bearing (Right)
parts.function: Rear right wheel carrier-mounted hub with integrated angular contact bearing providing the rotating interface for the rear wheel, brake disc, and drive shaft flange.

parts.label: Steering Rack (EPAS)
parts.function: Electric power-assisted rack-and-pinion steering gear converting steering column input into lateral tie rod motion to steer the front wheels.

parts.label: Steering Column with Intermediate Shaft
parts.function: Collapsible steering column with intermediate universal-joint shaft transmitting driver steering input from the wheel to the EPAS rack pinion.

parts.label: Steering Wheel — Sport Chrono Multi-Function
parts.function: Sport Chrono multi-function steering wheel providing driver interface for steering, horn, audio, telephone, and Sport Chrono lap timer functions.

parts.label: Tie Rod and Tie Rod End (Left)
parts.function: Left-side inner tie rod and ball-jointed outer end connecting the steering rack to the front left wheel carrier to steer the wheel.

parts.label: Tie Rod and Tie Rod End (Right)
parts.function: Right-side inner tie rod and ball-jointed outer end connecting the steering rack to the front right wheel carrier to steer the wheel.

parts.label: Brake Master Cylinder
parts.function: Converts brake pedal force into hydraulic pressure distributed to all four brake calipers via the ABS hydraulic unit.

parts.label: Brake Booster (Vacuum Servo)
parts.function: Vacuum-assisted servo unit amplifying driver pedal input before force reaches the master cylinder, reducing pedal effort.

parts.label: ABS / PSM Hydraulic Control Unit (Bosch)
parts.function: Bosch hydraulic modulator independently varying brake pressure at each wheel for ABS, traction control, and PSM stability management.

parts.label: Brake Lines — Hard Lines and Braided Flex Hoses
parts.function: Steel hard lines and stainless-braided flexible hoses routing hydraulic brake fluid between the ABS unit and each brake caliper.

parts.label: EPB Actuator — Motor-in-Caliper (Left)
parts.function: Electric park brake servo motor integrated into the rear left caliper, applying and releasing clamping force electronically on driver command or auto-hold.

parts.label: EPB Actuator — Motor-in-Caliper (Right)
parts.function: Electric park brake servo motor integrated into the rear right caliper, applying and releasing clamping force electronically on driver command or auto-hold.

parts.label: Brake Fluid Reservoir
parts.function: Translucent reservoir supplying DOT 4 brake fluid to the master cylinder and accommodating fluid volume changes as brake pads wear down.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Front Left
parts.function: Hall-effect sensor at the front left wheel carrier feeding real-time wheel speed to the ABS / PSM control unit for slip detection.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Front Right
parts.function: Hall-effect sensor at the front right wheel carrier feeding real-time wheel speed to the ABS / PSM control unit for slip detection.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Rear Left
parts.function: Hall-effect sensor at the rear left wheel carrier feeding real-time wheel speed to the ABS / PSM control unit for slip detection.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Rear Right
parts.function: Hall-effect sensor at the rear right wheel carrier feeding real-time wheel speed to the ABS / PSM control unit for slip detection.
